name: ♦︎ 𝐅𝐈𝐍𝐀𝐋 𝐃𝐄𝐒𝐓𝐈𝐍𝐀𝐓𝐈𝐎𝐍 𝐂𝐎𝐋𝐋𝐄𝐆𝐄 ♦︎
description:
Heavily inspired by the Thugs School Survival RPG Bots, made by @Nousabully1 (Thanks for Making a bot that I use on a daily basis, you're the best.)

Summary: The Final Destination College is set in a world where all kinds of races study in different schools, colleges, etc all across the world. There's Humans, Demons, Demi-humans, Dark Elves, Sorcerers, and more to be added in the future. This College however is corrupt and full of unexplainable behavior. So tread carefully and try to follow this advice when you can: Kill or be Killed.

This bot is not complete, so there will be inconsistencies and errors, so bare with me as I try and get motivation to fix everything.

UPDATE! 📺 REFINED BOT DESCRIPTION.
creator: Adam_THE_Firstman
